mapper.sql: select id, menu_name, parent_id, menu_type, path, component, permission, icon, sort, status, create_time, update_time from sys_menu
mapper.select: select distinct m.id, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.menu_type, m.path, m.component, m.permission, m.icon, m.sort, m.status, m.create_time, m.update_time from sys_menu m join sys_role_menu rm on m.id = rm.menu_id join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.status = 1 order by m.sort, m.id

select distinct m.permission from sys_menu m join sys_role_menu rm on m.id = rm.menu_id join sys_user_role ur on rm.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and m.status = 1 and m.permission is not null and m.permission != ''
mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu(menu_name, parent_id, menu_type, path, component, permission, icon, sort, status) values(#{menuName}, #{parentId}, #{menuType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{permission}, #{icon}, #{sort}, #{status})
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_role_menu where menu_id = #{menuId}
select count(*) > 0 from sys_menu where parent_id = #{menuId}
